summary: The diff shows changes to Footer.tsx that partially implement the requested footer styling updates. Font size was reduced and black color was applied, but there is a discrepancy with REQ-34's dark theme requirement.

missing_requirements.requirement: Text color is applied consistently across light and dark themes
missing_requirements.reason: The implementation uses 'text-black dark:text-white' which changes the text to white in dark mode, not black as specified in REQ-34 which requires black color (#000000) across both light and dark themes

hallucinated_features.description: Added font-bold styling to footer text
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-35 explicitly states 'No change to font family, only size and color are modified'. Adding bold weight is a modification beyond the requested size and color changes

hallucinated_features.description: Added tracking-tight utility for letter spacing
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement requested changes to letter spacing or tracking. Only font size and color changes were specified
